hooks.command: if [ -f .gitmodules ] && grep -q .architecture .gitmodules 2>/dev/null; then git submodule update --init .architecture 2>/dev/null; elif [ ! -d .architecture/.git ] && [ ! -f .architecture/.git ]; then git submodule add git@github.com:Sidcom-AB/sidcom-architecture.git .architecture 2>/dev/null; fi && if [ -d .architecture/docs ]; then echo '[sidcom-architecture] Architecture docs ready in .architecture/'; else echo '[sidcom-architecture] WARNING: .architecture/docs not found — run: git submodule add git@github.com:Sidcom-AB/sidcom-architecture.git .architecture'; fi
